name: Bacchus
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Bacchus embodies ecstasy, wine, liberation — under Jupiter; in Pisces, Leo.

overview.label: Tarot
overview.value: XV The Devil · XII Hanged Man

items.label: Tarot
items.value: XV The Devil · XII Hanged Man

related.name: Dionysus
related.teaser: Dionysus embodies ecstasy, wine, liberation — under Jupiter; in Pisces, Leo.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: ♆ Neptune
related.teaser: Neptune is the ocean of spirit — dream wave, mystic tide, abyss of compassion.

related.name: The Morrigan
related.teaser: The Morrigan embodies war, fate, sorcery — under Mars · Saturn; in Scorpio.

related.name: Manannan mac Lir
related.teaser: Manannan mac Lir embodies sea, tides, earthquakes — under Neptune/Moon; in Pisces, Cancer.

related.name: Njord
related.teaser: Njord embodies sea, tides, earthquakes — under Neptune/Moon; in Pisces, Cancer.

related.name: Poseidon
related.teaser: Poseidon embodies sea, tides, earthquakes — under Neptune/Moon; in Pisces, Cancer.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Inanna/Ishtar
related.teaser: Inanna/Ishtar embodies love and war paradox — under Venus · Mars; in Aries, Libra.

related.name: Odin
related.teaser: Odin embodies sky, thunder, sovereignty — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Mokosh
related.teaser: Mokosh embodies creation, cosmic order — under Sun · Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.
